title: The File-First AI Philosophy: Analyze Before You Automate
summary: AI belongs after you understand the file—not as a substitute for preview and filters.

content.summary: AI belongs after you understand the file—not as a substitute for preview and filters.

body.text: Automating confusion just produces faster wrong answers. Upload, inspect schema, chart distributions, save filters for your business slice. Only then ask Talk to Data to narrate or explore follow-ups. This order ensures you know which columns matter and which rows are excluded before language models enter.

body.alt: Charts and graphs for business reporting
body.caption: Charts and graphs for business reporting. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Upload, inspect schema, chart distributions, save filters for your business slice. Only then ask Talk to Data to narrate or explore follow-ups.
This order ensures you know which columns matter and which rows are excluded before language models enter.

items: Preview catches header shifts between exports.
Charts reveal outliers AI might over-weight in prose.
Saved rules define the population AI should respect.

body.text: Repeat the same grounded questions weekly on fresh uploads—automation with verification built in.
File-first AI is not anti-AI; it is pro-trust.
Datilio embodies file-first AI: the upload is the contract every feature—including Talk to Data—must honor.

meta_description: AI belongs after you understand the file—not as a substitute for preview and filters.
